basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 – Walk in
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee)
basic_details.short_information: IIT Roorkee is recruiting 1 Post Doctoral Fellow for a consultancy/research project on plastic biodegradation enzyme engineering. Last date for application submission will be notified; walk-in interview on 28.07.2026.

qualification.details: Candidates must meet the following qualifications.
qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Biotechnology, Microbiology, Biological Sciences, or equivalent with at least one research paper in SCI journal.
qualification.experience: Hands-on experience in cloning, gene expression, protein purification, crystallization, bacterial isolation, biodegradation studies, and metagenomics.

vacancy_details.details: One Post Doctoral Fellow position is available for this high-impact project aimed at developing enzymes for efficient plastic waste biodegradation through protein engineering and metagenomic approaches.

selection_process: Selection will be based on interview. Candidates must submit detailed CV and documents. Original certificates must be produced at the time of interview for verification. Preference will be given to SC/ST candidates with equal qualifications.
how_to_apply: Candidates should send their application with detailed CV, experience details, and attested copies of certificates via email or post to the Principal Investigator. They may also appear for walk-in interview on 28 July 2026 with all original documents.
important_instructions: No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The position is purely temporary. Selected candidate may get opportunity for PhD admission (as per note). Bring all original documents for verification. The institute reserves the right to cancel the recruitment at any stage.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Roorkee is recruiting 1 Post Doctoral Fellow for a consultancy/research project on plastic biodegradation enzyme engineering. Last date for application submission will be notified; walk-in interview on 28.07.2026.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_roorkee_i: Engineering and designing multifunctional enzymes for broad-spectrum plastic biodegradation
1 Year or till completion of the project
Committee Room, Department of Biosciences and Bioengineering

IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: One Post Doctoral Fellow position is available for this high-impact project aimed at developing enzymes for efficient plastic waste biodegradation through protein engineering and metagenomic approaches.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must meet the following qualifications.

rows.details: PhD in Biotechnology, Microbiology, Biological Sciences, or equivalent with at least one research paper in SCI journal.
Hands-on experience in cloning, gene expression, protein purification, crystallization, bacterial isolation, biodegradation studies, and metagenomics.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on interview. Candidates must submit detailed CV and documents. Original certificates must be produced at the time of interview for verification. Preference will be given to SC/ST candidates with equal qualifications.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates should send their application with detailed CV, experience details, and attested copies of certificates via email or post to the Principal Investigator. They may also appear for walk-in interview on 28 July 2026 with all original documents.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IIT Roorkee Candidates
content_sections.text: No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The position is purely temporary. Selected candidate may get opportunity for PhD admission (as per note). Bring all original documents for verification. The institute reserves the right to cancel the recruitment at any stage.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Roorkee Post Doctoral Fellow 2026?
faq.answer: Applications should reach the PI office by 5 PM (exact date mentioned in updated advertisement).

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Post Doctoral Fellow at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: Emoluments are ₹58,000 + 9% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for IIT Roorkee PDF position?
faq.answer: PhD in Biotechnology/Microbiology/Biological Sciences with at least one SCI journal paper and experience in protein engineering techniques.

faq.question: Q4. When is the interview for IIT Roorkee plastic biodegradation project?
faq.answer: The interview is scheduled on 28 July 2026 at 11:00 AM.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for IIT Roorkee project positions?
faq.answer: No application fee is required.

faq.question: Q6. What is the project title at IIT Roorkee Biosciences?
faq.answer: "Engineering and designing multifunctional enzymes for broad-spectrum plastic biodegradation".

faq.question: Q7. What experience is desirable for this Post Doctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: Expertise in cloning, expression, purification, crystallization, bacterial isolation, biodegradation, and metagenomic studies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the duration of the Post Doctoral Fellow appointment?
faq.answer: Initially 1 year or till the completion of the project.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent job at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: No, it is a temporary project position.

faq.question: Q10. Can selected candidates pursue PhD at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: Yes, the selected candidate may get an opportunity for PhD admission as per institute rules.
